body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-8240", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "Concrete CMS 9.5.0 and below is vulnerable to unauthenticated page metadata disclosure across every page with a configured summary template, revealing the existence of private, draft, and restricted pages while leaking title, path, description, and author information.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00195, "percentile": 0.09232}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vpgr-cwfx-pwfw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-24T21:09:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpgr-cwfx-pwfw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vpgr-cwfx-pwfw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8240"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T22:16:50Z", "published_at": "2026-05-22T00:31:16Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8240", "https://documentation.concretecms.org/9-x/developers/introduction/version-history/951-release-notes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpgr-cwfx-pwfw"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concretecms/concretecms", "summary": "Concrete CMS is vulnerable to unauthenticated page metadata disclosure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-24T21:09:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpgr-cwfx-pwfw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "concrete5/concrete5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
